description: Using the TitanicSurvival dataset at '~/Documents/Jamovi/TitanicSurvival.csv', perform a Chi-Square Test of Independence to examine the association between 'passengerClass' and 'survived'. The analysis should include expected counts, row percentages, and Cramér's V. Save the Jamovi project to '~/Documents/Jamovi/TitanicChiSquare.omv' and create a report at '~/Documents/Jamovi/chisquare_report.txt' containing the Chi-square statistic, degrees of freedom, p-value, and Cramér's V.
